title: Shadow Dragoons
body:
Shadow Dragoons magic and test edition

Re-wrote it to be modrinth compatible

This is mostly a tech themed modpack that lets you for example use water power to make elevators or have a inf expandable storage via applied energestics 2.  Some example features are trains,auto crafting, and powered furnaces.  This is for a server I own.

mods we use are

Applied energestics 2 with a whole slew of addon mods
create with more addon mods
mekanism
and more
